title: Seek + record permission to reproduce specific high-value source tables/figures
context: Governance-routed effort for ewing-survivorship-late-effects to seek and record explicit permission to reproduce specific high-value source tables/figures, undertaken ONLY where synthesis under the fact-vs-expression copyright firewall (synthesize facts and cite; never reproduce protected guideline text/tables/figures) is insufficient. It never relaxes the firewall unilaterally; any reproduction requires recorded, source-compatible permission.
objective: Seek and record explicit, source-compatible permission to reproduce specific high-value tables/figures where synthesis is insufficient.
acceptanceCriteria: Undertaken only where synthesis is demonstrably insufficient; governance-routed decision recorded
Permission requests and outcomes recorded per source with the granted license terms
Any reproduced element carries recorded permission and attribution; firewall otherwise upheld
